paper_title: Mapping and Analysis of LIA Moraines in the Tian Shan

methods.description: This method involves identifying and mapping Little Ice Age (LIA) moraines in the Tian Shan region using Google Earth imagery and converting these into shapefiles for further analysis.

steps.description: The delineated LIA moraines were saved as KML files from Google Earth.
steps.searchable_summary: export LIA moraines as KML files from Google Earth

steps.description: KML files were converted into shapefiles.
Polygons of LIA glacial extents were derived from overlapping the delineated LIA marginal moraine with its corresponding contemporary glacier(s).
steps.searchable_summary: derive LIA glacial extents by overlapping moraines with contemporary glaciers

steps.description: To produce the final map, the SRTM 1 arc-second DEM and contemporary and LIA glacial extents were integrated in ArcGIS 10.1 and projected to the Universal Transverse Mercator coordinate system, zone 45 N, in datum WGS1984.
steps.searchable_summary: integrate DEM and glacial extents in ArcGIS and project to UTM

steps.description: Hillshaded relief was produced with 60% transparency and stacked under the DEM layer that was set with 30% transparency.
steps.searchable_summary: create hillshaded relief with transparency settings

methods.description: This method describes the data sources used for mapping LIA glacial extents, including Google Earth imagery and SRTM DEM, and how these data were processed.

steps.description: Google Earth high-resolution imagery was utilized as the major source to map the LIA glacial extents.
steps.searchable_summary: use Google Earth imagery for mapping LIA extents

steps.description: The Shuttle Radar Topography Mission (SRTM) 1 arc-second digital elevation model (DEM) was downloaded from the USGS Earth Explorer.
steps.searchable_summary: download SRTM DEM from USGS Earth Explorer

steps.description: The SRTM DEM was clipped to the mapping area to help identify and calculate landform characteristics.
steps.searchable_summary: clip SRTM DEM to mapping area

steps.description: Contemporary glaciers in the eastern Tian Shan were extracted from the Second Glacier Inventory of China.
steps.searchable_summary: extract contemporary glaciers from Second Glacier Inventory of China
